de: Was bedeuten die Robotersoldaten der Ukraine für die Zukunft der Kriegsführung? Ferngesteuerte Waffen werden schon seit einiger Zeit eingesetzt, aber die KI steht nun an der Schwelle, Entscheidungen auf dem Schlachtfeld zu treffen.
title: What do Ukraine’s robot soldiers mean for the future of warfare?
description: Remote-controlled weapons have been used for some time, but AI is now on the cusp of making battlefield decisions.
en: What do Ukraine’s robot soldiers mean for the future of warfare?. Remote-controlled weapons have been used for some time, but AI is now on the cusp of making battlefield decisions.

de: Das Yale College ehrt Junioren für Führungsqualitäten, Stipendien und Beiträge zur Gemeinschaft. 72 Juniorstudenten des Yale College wurden vom Council of the Heads of Colleges für ihre Gelehrsamkeit, ihren Charakter und ihren Beitrag zum College-Leben ausgezeichnet.
title: Yale College honors juniors for leadership, scholarship, community contributions
description: Seventy-two Yale College juniors were recognized by the Council of the Heads of Colleges for their scholarship, character, and contributions to college life.
en: Yale College honors juniors for leadership, scholarship, community contributions. Seventy-two Yale College juniors were recognized by the Council of the Heads of Colleges for their scholarship, character, and contributions to college life.
